title: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='340' height='240' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='310' height='210' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='280' height='180' fill='#411C56'/><text x='50' y='80' font-size='24' font-family='Arial' fill='#fff'>SaaS Analytics</text><text x='60' y='120' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#fff'>Date Range:</text><text x='70' y='160' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#fff'>Metric Type:</text><text x='80' y='200' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#fff'>KPI Values:</text><text x='90' y='240' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#fff'>Detailed Data:</text><path d='M100,220 L150,220 L150,200 L100,200'/><path d='M200,220 L250,220 L250,200 L200,200'/><path d='M100,220 L80,220 L80,200 L100,200'/><path d='M250,220 L230,220 L230,200 L250,200'/><g transform='translate(20, 180)'><circle cx='10' cy='10' r='10' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='20' cy='10' r='10' fill='#fff'/><circle cx='30' cy='10' r='10' fill='#fff'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include a date range picker and metric type selector

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Performance Analytics Dashboard for SaaS

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, date range picker, metric type selector, chart, and table.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
